## 2. Layout Patterns

### 2.1 Page Structure

The Page component uses class `pf-v6-c-page` with the following structure:

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  MASTHEAD (pf-v6-c-masthead) - z-index: 300                │
│  ├── MastheadMain (logo, toggle)                           │
│  └── MastheadContent (toolbar)                             │
├────────────┬────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  SIDEBAR   │  PAGE MAIN CONTAINER                          │
│  (z: 200)  │  ├── PageSection (breadcrumb)                 │
│            │  ├── PageSection (main content)               │
│            │  └── PageSection (footer)                     │
│  Width:    │                                                │
│  18.125rem │  Default inset: 1.5rem                        │
└────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### CSS Classes

| Element | Class |
|---------|-------|
| Page container | `pf-v6-c-page` |
| Main container | `pf-v6-c-page__main-container` |
| Sidebar | `pf-v6-c-page__sidebar` |
| Sidebar header | `pf-v6-c-page__sidebar-header` |
| Sidebar body | `pf-v6-c-page__sidebar-body` |
| Main section | `pf-v6-c-page__main-section` |
| Masthead | `pf-v6-c-masthead` |

#### PageSection Type Modifiers

| Type | Class |
|------|-------|
| Default | `pf-v6-c-page__main-default` |
| Subnav | `pf-v6-c-page__main-subnav` |
| Breadcrumb | `pf-v6-c-page__main-breadcrumb` |
| Tabs | `pf-v6-c-page__main-tabs` |
| Wizard | `pf-v6-c-page__main-wizard` |

#### Section Modifiers

| Modifier | Class | Purpose |
|----------|-------|---------|
| Secondary background | `pf-m-secondary` | Gray background (#f2f2f2) |
| Sticky top | `pf-m-sticky-top` | Fixed to top |
| Sticky bottom | `pf-m-sticky-bottom` | Fixed to bottom |
| Shadow top | `pf-m-shadow-top` | Top shadow |
| Shadow bottom | `pf-m-shadow-bottom` | Bottom shadow |
| Limit width | `pf-m-limit-width` | Constrains width |

### 2.2 Grid System

Base class: `pf-v6-l-grid`

#### Column Span Classes

```css
.pf-m-{1-12}-col          /* Column span from 1 to 12 */
.pf-m-all-{1-12}-col      /* Apply to all children from container */
.pf-m-offset-{1-12}-col   /* Horizontal offset */
.pf-m-{2-x}-row           /* Row span */
```

#### Responsive Breakpoints

| Breakpoint | Suffix | Default Value |
|------------|--------|---------------|
| Base | (none) | 0 |
| sm | `-on-sm` | 576px (36rem) |
| md | `-on-md` | 768px (48rem) |
| lg | `-on-lg` | 992px (62rem) |
| xl | `-on-xl` | 1200px (75rem) |
| 2xl | `-on-2xl` | 1450px (90.625rem) |

**Usage:**
```css
.pf-m-6-col-on-lg    /* 6 columns at lg breakpoint */
.pf-m-12-col-on-sm   /* Full width at sm breakpoint */
```

#### Gap/Gutter Settings

```css
.pf-m-gutter    /* Adds space using --pf-v6-l-grid--m-gutter--GridGap (default: 1rem) */
```

CSS variable: `--pf-v6-l-grid--m-gutter--GridGap`

#### Ordering

```css
--pf-v6-l-grid--item--Order{-on-[breakpoint]}: {order}
```

## 3. Component Mapping (BlueprintJS -> PatternFly v6)

### 3.1 Direct Equivalents

| BlueprintJS | PatternFly v6 | Notes |
|-------------|---------------|-------|
| `Button` | `Button` | Similar variants (primary, secondary, danger) |
| `Card` | `Card` | Similar structure (header, body, footer) |
| `Dialog` | `Modal` | PatternFly uses Modal terminology |
| `Popover` | `Popover` | Direct equivalent |
| `Menu` | `Menu` / `Dropdown` | PatternFly separates menu and dropdown |
| `MenuItem` | `MenuItem` / `DropdownItem` | Context-dependent |
| `Table` (HTMLTable) | `Table` | PatternFly has more variants |
| `Tabs` | `Tabs` | Similar API |
| `Tag` | `Label` | **Name change** - BlueprintJS Tag = PatternFly Label |
| `Toast` / `Toaster` | `Alert` + `AlertGroup` | Toast uses Alert with `isToast` prop |
| `Spinner` | `Spinner` | Direct equivalent |
| `ProgressBar` | `Progress` | Name change |
| `Tree` | `TreeView` | Similar functionality |
| `Breadcrumbs` | `Breadcrumb` | Singular naming |
| `Navbar` | `Masthead` + `Toolbar` | PatternFly splits into components |
| `Icon` | `Icon` | Different icon library |
| `Drawer` | `Drawer` | Direct equivalent |
| `Divider` | `Divider` | Direct equivalent |
| `Checkbox` | `Checkbox` | Direct equivalent |
| `Radio` | `Radio` | Direct equivalent |
| `Switch` | `Switch` | Direct equivalent |
| `TextInput` / `InputGroup` | `TextInput` / `InputGroup` | Similar API |
| `HTMLSelect` | `FormSelect` | Name change |
| `DateInput` | `DatePicker` | Name change |
| `TimeInput` | `TimePicker` | Name change |

### 3.2 Removed/Replaced Components

| BlueprintJS | PatternFly v6 | Migration Path |
|-------------|---------------|----------------|
| `Chip` | **Removed** | Use `Label` instead |
| `Tile` | **Removed** | Use `Card` instead |
| `Text` | `Content` | Renamed in PatternFly v6 |
| `Callout` | `Alert` (inline) | Use `isInline` prop |
| `NonIdealState` | `EmptyState` | Different API |

### 3.3 Intent Color Mapping

BlueprintJS uses "Intent" colors. PatternFly uses "Status" colors.

| BlueprintJS Intent | PatternFly Status | Token Prefix |
|--------------------|-------------------|--------------|
| `Intent.PRIMARY` | Brand | `--pf-t--global--color--brand--*` |
| `Intent.SUCCESS` | Success | `--pf-t--global--*--status--success--*` |
| `Intent.WARNING` | Warning | `--pf-t--global--*--status--warning--*` |
| `Intent.DANGER` | Danger | `--pf-t--global--*--status--danger--*` |
| `Intent.NONE` | Default/Info | `--pf-t--global--*--status--info--*` |

### 3.4 CSS Class Convention Changes

| BlueprintJS | PatternFly v6 |
|-------------|---------------|
| `bp5-*` | `pf-v6-c-*` (components) |
| `bp5-*` | `pf-v6-l-*` (layouts) |
| `bp5-*` | `pf-v6-u-*` (utilities) |
| `bp5-*` | `pf-v6-m-*` (modifiers) |

**PatternFly class naming:**
- `pf-v6-c-` = Component
- `pf-v6-l-` = Layout
- `pf-v6-u-` = Utility
- `pf-v6-m-` = Modifier

## 4. Dashboard Patterns

### 4.1 Masthead Configuration

```jsx
<Masthead>
  <MastheadMain>
    <MastheadToggle>
      <PageToggleButton variant="plain" />
    </MastheadToggle>
    <MastheadLogo>
      <MastheadBrand>{/* Logo */}</MastheadBrand>
    </MastheadLogo>
  </MastheadMain>
  <MastheadContent>
    <Toolbar>
      <ToolbarContent>
        <ToolbarItem>{/* Actions */}</ToolbarItem>
      </ToolbarContent>
    </Toolbar>
  </MastheadContent>
</Masthead>
```

### 4.2 Sidebar Navigation

**Vertical Navigation Types:**
1. **Simple** - Single level
2. **Grouped** - Related items under non-interactive headers
3. **Expandable** - Collapsible nested items (2-level, 3-level)
4. **Flyout** - Overlay panels on hover/click
5. **Drilldown** - Replaces menu with child items

**Best Practices:**
- Use consistent approach at same hierarchy level
- Don't mix flyouts, drilldowns, and expansions at identical levels
- Drilldowns work best when users stay within same parent
- Use breadcrumbs with flyout menus for clarity

### 4.3 Toolbar Structure

```jsx
<Toolbar>
  <ToolbarContent>
    <ToolbarGroup variant="filter-group">
      <ToolbarItem>
        <ToolbarFilter labels={activeFilters}>
          {/* Filter component */}
        </ToolbarFilter>
      </ToolbarItem>
    </ToolbarGroup>
    <ToolbarGroup variant="action-group-plain">
      <ToolbarItem>
        <Button variant="plain" />
      </ToolbarItem>
    </ToolbarGroup>
  </ToolbarContent>
</Toolbar>
```

#### Toolbar CSS Classes

| Class | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `pf-v6-c-toolbar` | Base class |
| `pf-m-primary` | White background |
| `pf-m-secondary` | Gray background |
| `pf-m-no-background` | Transparent |
| `pf-m-sticky` | Fixed position (z-index: 100) |
| `pf-m-full-height` | Remove padding |

#### Toolbar Spacing

| Property | Options |
|----------|---------|
| `gap` | `gapNone` to `gap4xl` |
| `columnGap` | Default: 1rem |
| `rowGap` | Default: 0.5rem |
| `inset` | `insetNone` to `inset2xl` |

### 4.4 Content Area Layout

```jsx
<Page
  masthead={<Masthead />}
  sidebar={<PageSidebar />}
  isContentFilled
>
  <PageSection type="breadcrumb">
    <Breadcrumb />
  </PageSection>
  <PageSection variant="secondary" isFilled>
    {/* Main content */}
  </PageSection>
</Page>
```

## 5. Data Visualization

### 5.1 Charts Overview

PatternFly charts use Victory chart library with PatternFly theming.

**Installation:**
```bash
yarn add @patternfly/react-charts victory
```

**Import path (v6):**
```javascript
import { Chart, ChartBar } from '@patternfly/react-charts/victory';
import '@patternfly/patternfly/patternfly-charts.css'; // For dark theme
```

### 5.2 Available Chart Types

| Chart Type | Use Case |
|------------|----------|
| **Area Chart** | Trends over continuous scale |
| **Bar Chart** | Comparing categories (vertical/horizontal) |
| **Bullet Chart** | Data with thresholds and ranges |
| **Donut Chart** | Part-to-whole relationships, progress |
| **Donut Utilization** | Percentage-based utilization |
| **Line Chart** | Data changes over time |
| **Pie Chart** | Proportional data (up to 5+ points) |
| **Sparkline** | Value changes over time (compact) |
| **Stack Chart** | Categorical data across variables |
| **Box Plot** | Statistical distributions |
| **Sankey** | Flow relationships |
| **Scatter** | Data point correlations |
| **Threshold** | Data against thresholds |

### 5.3 Chart Theming

Default styles align with light theme. For dark theme:

```javascript
import '@patternfly/patternfly/patternfly-charts.css';
```

Chart color tokens use prefix: `--pf-t--chart--*`

### 5.4 Table Component

Base class: `pf-v6-c-table`

#### Table Variants

| Variant | Class/Prop | Description |
|---------|------------|-------------|
| Default | - | Standard table |
| Compact | `pf-m-compact` / `isCompact` | Reduced spacing |
| Striped | `isStriped` | Alternating row colors |

#### Table Features

| Feature | Implementation |
|---------|----------------|
| Sorting | `ThSortType` with `OnSort` handler |
| Selection | `TdSelectType` / `ThSelectType` with checkboxes |
| Expandable rows | `TdExpandType` with `ExpandableRowContent` |
| Resizable columns | Q3 2025 feature (beta) |
| Sticky columns | `isStickyColumn` modifier |

#### Responsive Behavior

Table adapts via `gridBreakPoint` prop:
- `'grid-md'`
- `'grid-lg'`
- `'grid-xl'`

Mobile views display `dataLabel` attributes as context.

### 5.5 Data List

Base class: `pf-v6-c-data-list`

**Key difference from Table:** DataLists do not have headers. Use Table if headers are required.

Features:
- Flexible layout using PatternFly layouts
- Drag and drop sorting via `<DragDropSort>`
- Checkboxes via `<DataListCheck>` (uses Checkbox internally)


## 7. Migration Considerations

### 7.1 Breaking Changes from v5 to v6

1. **Component Replacements:**
   - Chip -> Label
   - Tile -> Card
   - Text -> Content

2. **CSS Class Prefix:**
   - `pf-v5-*` -> `pf-v6-*`

3. **Breakpoints:**
   - Now use rem units (divide px by 16)
   - 576px -> 36rem
   - 768px -> 48rem
   - 992px -> 62rem
   - 1200px -> 75rem
   - 1450px -> 90.625rem

4. **Token Prefix (React):**
   - Design tokens now have `t_` prefix to differentiate from CSS variables

5. **Chart Import Path:**
   - `'@patternfly/react-charts'` -> `'@patternfly/react-charts/victory'`

### 7.2 Codemods Available

```bash
npx @patternfly/pf-codemods@latest <path> --v6
```

Available codemods:
- `class-name-updater` - Renames classes to v6
- `tokens-update` - Updates global CSS variables and React tokens
- `css-vars-updater` - Updates CSS variables in non-React files

### 7.3 Testing Considerations

Potential test failures:
- Button attribute detection changes
- Select component role queries
- Component API changes

### 7.4 React Version Support

PatternFly 6 supports:
- React 17
- React 18
- React 19 (as of Q2 2025)

Non-breaking update; continues supporting older versions per support policy.

## Research Complete

I have created a comprehensive PatternFly v6 Design System research document at `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/_migration_memory/10_patternfly.md`.

### Document Summary

The research document covers the following key areas for the MMS V2.0 migration:

**1. Visual Foundation**
- Complete design token architecture (3-layer system: palette, base, semantic)
- Token naming convention: `--pf-t--[scope]--[component]--[property]--[concept]--[variant]--[state]`
- Color tokens for status (danger, success, warning, info), backgrounds, text, brand, and borders with exact hex values
- Typography scale using Red Hat fonts (Display, Text, Mono) with exact rem/px values
- Spacing system from xs (4px) to 4xl (80px) with semantic categories (action, control, gap, gutter, inset)
- Dark mode implementation via `pf-v6-theme-dark` class

**2. Layout Patterns**
- Complete Page structure with Masthead, Sidebar, PageSection
- Grid system with 12-column layout, responsive breakpoints (sm/md/lg/xl/2xl), and gap settings
- CSS class conventions (`pf-v6-c-*` for components, `pf-v6-l-*` for layouts, `pf-v6-m-*` for modifiers)

**3. Component Mapping (BlueprintJS -> PatternFly)**
- Direct equivalents table (Button, Card, Dialog->Modal, Menu->Dropdown, etc.)
- Removed/replaced components (Chip->Label, Tile->Card, Text->Content)
- Intent to Status color mapping (PRIMARY->Brand, SUCCESS->Success, WARNING->Warning, DANGER->Danger)
- CSS class convention changes (`bp5-*` -> `pf-v6-*`)

**4. Dashboard Patterns**
- Masthead configuration with toggle, logo, and toolbar
- Sidebar navigation types (simple, grouped, expandable, flyout, drilldown)
- Toolbar structure with filter groups and action groups

**5. Data Visualization**
- Charts using Victory library with PatternFly theming
- All available chart types (Area, Bar, Donut, Line, etc.)
- Table component with sorting, selection, expandable rows
- DataList for flexible layouts without headers

**6. Key CSS Variables Reference**
- Complete list of most-used global tokens
- React token import patterns and naming conversion

**7. Migration Considerations**
- Breaking changes from v5 to v6
- Available codemods for automated migration
- React version support (17, 18, 19)
- MMS-specific color mapping recommendations
